mechanism_narrative: Positive momentum in industrial production signals improving operating leverage and earnings breadth; when INDPRO growth is stronger on a 3-month basis, S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible INDPRO snapshot value was 104.4016
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month INDPRO growth does not produce positive average 20-day S&P 500 returns, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 over consecutive 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp CPI acceleration raises the expected policy-rate path and equity discount rates; when CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation crosses above its 12-month median, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL year-over-year growth crosses above its trailing 12-month median
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 0.4
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if adding FEDFUNDS does not improve out-of-sample hit rate versus CPIAUCSL alone.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate signals weakening household income and recession risk; when UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage point over 3 months, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.3 percentage point over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible UNRATE snapshot value was 5.0
failure_condition: Reject if triggered windows do not show negative mean 60-day S&P 500 returns or if PAYEMS weakness is absent in more than half of triggered UNRATE increases.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales acceleration signals resilient nominal consumption and near-term revenue support; when RSAFS rises for three consecutive months, S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS increases for three consecutive monthly observations
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible RSAFS snapshot value was 459821.0
failure_condition: Reject if the 5-day forward return hit rate after three-month RSAFS increases is below 50% over two full walk-forward test cycles.

mechanism_narrative: A housing-starts downturn leads cyclical earnings weakness through construction, durables, and credit channels; when HOUST falls below its trailing 6-month average, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below its trailing 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible HOUST snapshot value was 1142.0
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downside crossings have nonnegative average 60-day S&P 500 returns or if downside crossings underperform baseline by less than 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: An increase in the federal funds rate tightens financial conditions and reduces equity valuation multiples; when FEDFUNDS rises versus its 3-month prior value, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is higher than its value 3 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 0.4
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day forward S&P 500 returns following 3-month FEDFUNDS increases are positive in more than 60% of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: Stagflationary pressure appears when industrial production weakens while CPI rises, compressing margins and valuation multiples; under this joint condition, S&P 500 returns are negative over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is negative while CPIAUCSL 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint INDPRO-down and CPIAUCSL-up condition fails to produce lower 20-day returns than either condition alone in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Real activity breadth is strongest when GDP and payrolls both expand, supporting earnings revisions and risk appetite; when GDPC1 growth is positive and PAYEMS growth is positive, S&P 500 returns are positive over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly change is positive and PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:latest visible GDPC1 snapshot value was 16583.1
fact:latest visible PAYEMS snapshot value was 144747.0
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and PAYEMS condition has a 60-day forward S&P 500 return hit rate below 55% or no improvement over PAYEMS alone.
